rule CDB_Microsoft_Security_Advisory_CVE202642899 {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-42899 – ASP.NET Core Denial of Service Vuln"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-18"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-42899" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-42899 – ASP.NET Core De"; content:"CVE-2026-42899"; nocase; sid:4034555; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-32175 – .NET Core Tampe"; content:"CVE-2026-32175"; nocase; sid:4258230; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: ruby-jwt: Empty-key HMAC bypass; cross-language sibling of C"; content:"CVE-2026-44351"; nocase; sid:3767012; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Exploit for CVE-2024-32019 exploit"; content:"CVE-2024-32019"; nocase; sid:4061069; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 195 threat advisories. Of these, 4 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 93 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Provides layered detection coverage for identified TTPs
